summary: Reactive validation rules and validation binding support for ViewModels and forms.
recommendedPatterns: Use ValidationRule and BindValidation instead of ad hoc imperative validation glue.
Implement IValidatableViewModel or inherit ReactiveValidationObject when needed.
Keep validation messages and formatting consistent.
avoidPatterns: Do not sprinkle stringly-typed validation errors through the UI layer.
Do not keep validation logic in the view when it belongs in the ViewModel.
setupSteps: Create validation rules close to the relevant properties.
Bind validation output in the view.
commonPitfalls: Forgetting to target the property explicitly in observable validation rules.
Duplicating validation rules in multiple layers.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
